description: DeerNexus Tenant Ops — per-Org usage is intentionally NOT a public dashboard (observability-and-slo.md §8.4 / §4.1 forbid org_id as a public metric label). Per-Org views come from UsageRecord aggregation in the Tenant Console (PR-060/061). This dashboard surfaces only the operator-side platform-wide totals that do not break tenant isolation.

panels.title: Platform-wide Run volume by terminal status
Per-Org breakdown is NOT here — see Tenant Console (TODO: PR-060/061)

options.content:
Per-Org Run / token / cost / failure views come from UsageRecord aggregation
in the Tenant Console (PR-060 Org Console API + PR-061 Admin Console UI),
NOT from a shared Grafana dashboard. This is deliberate: §4.1 forbids org_id
as a public metric label to avoid unbounded cardinality in the shared
time-series store. §8.4: "按 Org 的 Run、token、cost、failure 使用受控
Console / Usage 聚合，不在共享 Metrics Dashboard 暴露 Org 标签。"

title: DeerNexus — Tenant Ops (platform-wide only)
